title: CICS resource overrides JSON Schema for CICS TS 6.3.0.
description: Schema that describes the structure of a CICS resource overrides document.

schemaVersion.description: Specify the resource overrides schema version.

resourcetypes.description: Resources to be overridden are list items after the resourceOverrides mapping.

atomserviceSelector.description: Use 'selector' to define the set of ATOMSERVICE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name.description: ATOMSERVICE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

group.description: The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

atomtype.description: Specify a value from the following list: FEED | SERVICE | COLLECTION | CATEGORY.

db2entrySelector.description: Use 'selector' to define the set of DB2ENTRY resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name.description: DB2ENTRY resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

group.description: The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

accountrec.description: Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TXID | TASK | UOW.

authid.description: Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

authtype.description: Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX.

drollback.description: Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

plan.description: Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

planexitname.description: Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

priority.description: Specify a value from the following list: HIGH | EQUAL | LOW.

protectnum.description: Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

sharelocks.description: Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

threadlimit.description: Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

threadwait.description: Specify a value from the following list: POOL | "YES" | "NO".

replace.description: Replace all instances of the 'find' value with the 'replace' value. Specify a string of between 1 and 44 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#.-]. lsrpoolSelector.description: Use 'selector' to define the set of LSRPOOL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name.description: LSRPOOL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

group.description: The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

name.description: TSMODEL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

find.description: Find a specific value in the WSBIND attribute value. Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

replace.description: Replace all instances of the 'find' value with the 'replace' value. Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

set.description: Set a new value for the WSBIND attribute value. Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.
